issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for API failures.
Skill is vendor-locked to Google Vertex AI and Node.js, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: Imagen background swap with user-provided mask
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for @google-cloud/vertexai or the REST predict endpoint and misses the AI SDK generateImage surface with imagen-3.0-capability-001 and the EDIT_MODE_BGSWAP / MASK_MODE_USER_PROVIDED enums the rubric checks.

scenarios.name: Veo 3.1 9:16 video ad with audio via AI SDK
scenarios.rationale: Baseline manually polls the Vertex predictLongRunning REST endpoint; treatment uses experimental_generateVideo with vertex.video, generateAudio:true, and pollTimeoutMs:600000 as documented.
